prompt:
A small hobby servo on a bench next to a notebook page showing a simple sweep plot and endstop markers (all notes illegible). The servo horn is attached, and a thin signal cable runs to a compact microcontroller board off to the side, suggesting a baseline jitter and range test.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future maker lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, tidy wiring, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the servo and the plotted “sweep log” page clearly visible and icon-friendly.
